data.title: Lido DAO suggests $20M LDO repurchase to combat 95.9% price drop. Despite $255M market cap, Lido holds 23.2% of staked Ether.
data.description: Even though Lido's staking protocol remains the leading contributor to staked Ether with 23.2%, the LDO token has plummeted by 95.9% from its peak. The current market capitalization sits at $255 million.

data.title: Potential US crackdown on crypto looms without clear rules. Senate stalled on CLARITY Act due to disagreements on stablecoin yields.
data.description: The progress of the CLARITY Act has come to a halt in the Senate as banks, cryptocurrency firms, and legislators could not come to a consensus on crucial components, such as permitting stablecoin returns. The impasse has resulted in a delay in the enactment of the Act, with significant numbers of financial institutions, digital asset companies, and officials being involved in the negotiations.
